failures.description: The Researcher invoked ProductCatalogSearch with invalid arguments: {"product_id": 0} instead of including both string fields item_id="1096508426" and product_id="1808611083".
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was clear: check whether item 1096508426 for product 1808611083 has difficulty level=beginner using ProductCatalogSearch. The required IDs were already available at index 1. At index 2, the agent attempted a concrete tool call with malformed arguments: it omitted item_id and used product_id as numeric 0 instead of the provided string "1808611083". The tool then explicitly returned a SchemaError at index 3. This is a schema/argument validation failure, not a misunderstanding of the user goal or a system/access issue.
